summary: Current main still has the stale pending-task recovery bug reported by #94008. #94016 is the canonical editable contributor PR, but it needs a focused repair and regression proof before any merge or issue closeout; merge/close/comment actions are blocked by job frontmatter.

actions.reason: Keep the issue open as the canonical user report until #94016 is repaired, validated, and landed.

Repair the editable contributor branch so a later health-monitor start pass can clear stale pending task state and continue into channel startup without changing retry policy, timeout defaults, or unrelated startup semantics.
Provide an executable repair artifact for the deterministic Clownfish executor; no GitHub mutation is emitted by this worker.

repair_candidate.summary: Repair #94016 on the editable contributor branch. Preserve the first-pass timeout recovery behavior, but make a subsequent start attempt clear the stale pending task/abort bookkeeping when recoveryStartRequested is already set and then continue into normal channel startup.
repair_candidate.pr_title: fix(gateway): resume channel after pending task recovery
repair_candidate.pr_body:
## Summary
- Repairs #94016 on the contributor branch for #94008.
- Keeps the initial stop-timeout recovery deferral, but lets a later monitor/start pass clear stale pending task state and proceed into channel startup.
- Preserves channel retry policy, timeout defaults, and manual-stop behavior.

## Credit
- Based on the source PR from @sheyanmin: https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/94016
- Fixes the user report from @thomasthelen-kibeauftragter: https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/issues/94008

## Verification
- pnpm test src/gateway/server-channels.test.ts -- -t "server-channels auto restart"
- pnpm check:changed
- /review
credit_notes: Preserve source PR credit for @sheyanmin via https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/94016.
Do not edit CHANGELOG.md directly; carry release-note context in the repaired PR body/merge message.
